title: Origin Collection
description: Adds Deer, Demon, piglin brute, moth, and minotaur origins to minecraft
body:
This adds a group of origins such as Deer, Demon, piglin brute, moth, and minotaur.

All of these origins have a variety of different abilities to spice up gameplay

some of the abilities for the different origins include:

 

Deer: increase speed at low health but gain weakness

Demon: gain buffs by killing mobs

 

moth: gain effects by being near light sources

 

piglin brute: more durability for gold tools

 

minotaur: give yourself regeneration with your own harvestable milk
